amendment_target: Proposal for a regulation — Article 58 — paragraph 9 (new)
body_md:
**Target:** Proposal for a regulation — Article 58 — paragraph 9 (new)

## Text proposed by the Commission

*(no text)*

## Amendment of the European Parliament

The advisory forum may establish standing or temporary subgroups as appropriate for the purpose of examining specific questions related to the objectives of this Regulation.
parliament_text: The advisory forum may establish standing or temporary subgroups as appropriate for the purpose of examining specific questions related to the objectives of this Regulation.
